# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrade TinyWall from .NET Framework 4.8.1 to .NET 10 using a hybrid strategy. The plan upgrades lower-risk foundation libraries first, then independent Windows components, then the main TinyWall WinForms application, with installer and full-solution validation at the end.

**Progress**: 1/6 tasks complete (17%) ![17%](https://progress-bar.xyz/17)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-sdk-environment: SDK environment
- 🔲 02-foundation-libraries: Foundation libraries
- 🔲 03-windows-filtering-library: Windows filtering library
- 🔲 04-tinywall-application: TinyWall application
- 🔲 05-installer-packaging: Installer packaging
- 🔲 06-solution-validation: Solution validation
